description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The magazine is a detachable box type, protruding from the bottom of the receiver, and the trigger guard is clearly visible. The barrel is long and slender, extending forward with a simple cylindrical profile and no visible muzzle device. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the rear sight near the receiver and the front sight at the end of the barrel. The overall appearance suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm suitable for both military and civilian use, with a blend of wood and metal materials giving it a traditional yet functional look.
description: A traditional rifle with a wooden fixed stock, black metal receiver, long barrel, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and foregrip, black receiver, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and the wooden foregrip, with minimal detail visible on the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the wooden stock, foregrip, and the magazine protruding from the receiver.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the underside of the barrel and foregrip, with the magazine and trigger guard partially visible.
